Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log shows three cases Lets analyze the behavior Activities RA Receive Application VF Validate Form AE Assess Eligibility RMI Request Missing Info AD Approval Decision SC Send Confirmation AC Archive Case Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC Observations The process always starts with RA Then VF Then AE

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then either AD approval decision directly or optionally RMI request missing info After RMI there is VF again In case 3 RMI occurs twice before VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the pattern is after AE there are two possibilities Directly go to AD or go to a loop that involves RMI and then VF and then after that loop go to AD

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can express RMI as a loop RMI tau would generate one or more RMIs Then after that we have VF So the pattern after AE would be RMI tau then VF But then we need to make the whole thing optional because case 2 has no RMI and no VF So we could have X tau sequence of loop RMI tau and VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: That would generate empty RMI VF RMI RMI VF etc That matches all cases case 2 empty case 1 RMI VF case 3 RMI RMI VF Perfect

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now after that optional part we have AD then SC then AC So the overall process is RA then VF then AE then X tau sequence of loop RMI tau and VF then AD then SC then AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: If XOR chooses tau RA VF AE AD SC AC case 2 If XOR chooses the sequence with one RMI RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC case 1 If XOR chooses the sequence with two RMIs RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC case 3 Perfect
